{{Quote|Medpac Four to Group Leader... I have a visual on the Imperial Task Force... repeat... a visual on the Imperial Task Force.|Medpac Four|<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>}}
'''Medpac Squadron''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] makeshift [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadron organized specifically to participate in the [[battle in the Milagro system]], which occurred in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].<ref name="JK" />

==History==
When the [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] ''[[New Hope]]'' was in orbit above [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]], it encountered support fighters from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. At that time the ''Hope'' had no support other than a single [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] squadron. To supplement this attack group, some freshly cured or wounded [[pilot/Legends|pilots]] who could walk, were quickly recruited from the [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] ''[[Mercy (hospital ship)|Mercy]]''. Under the command of Group Leader [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'', they descended to Milagro where some [[starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were stationed.<ref name="JK" />

Thus two more [[squadron/Legends|squadrons]] were quickly thrown together from starfighters on Milagro's surface: secondhand [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], X-wings, and two new [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]]. Circumstances being too rushed for the new squadrons to be assigned call signs, each was allowed to choose its own. Squadron two, as a testament to the fact that the majority of its pilots were wounded patients, and to the personal amusement of [[General/Legends|General]] Solo, gave itself the appropriate moniker "[[Medpac/Legends|Medpac]] Squadron". As Solo's leadership was crucial for this makeshift group, the ''Falcon'' operated in a protected position, covered by a screen of Y-wings.<ref name="JK" />

Medpac Squadron played an active role in the Battle of Milagro, forming the vanguard of the three squadrons' attack along with the [[Blue_Squadron_(Rebel_Alliance)/Legends#New_Republic_Service|Blue Squadron]]. While they were launching from the planet, looking for the Star Destroyer from where the [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] were launched, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] came from [[hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and located it visually, transmitting the information to the ''Falcon''.<ref name="JK" /> 

Medpac One was the first to report at least twenty enemy fighters attacking the group to Solo, who ordered to continue their course towards Destroyer and to avoid dogfights near the ''New Hope''. In the following fifteen [[standard minute/Legends|minutes]], the squadron attracted some fighters and lost two X-wings; those who were pulled away from the counterattack were left to fend off for themselves. Eventually Medpac Four reported visual contact with the main [[task force/Legends|Task Force]].<ref name="JK" />
